---
title: "Research"
---

My research lies at the intersection of ecological economics, sustainable finance, and political economy. I focus on financing gaps for biodiversity and climate action, macro-financial conditions for ecological transitions, and the institutional economics of environmental finance instruments.

---

## Peer-Reviewed Articles

**Chronicle of a Debt Foretold: Green Debt Strategies in a Fossil Fuel-Dependent Economy**
with Antoine Godin, Louis Daumas, Josh Althouse & Romain Svartzman
*International Review of Economics and Finance*, 2026
[[DOI]](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.iref.2026.105301)

<br>

**Selective Carbon Credits: Market Preferences and Ecosystem Restoration in Senegal**
with Romain Prudhomme, Mamadou Ba, Pape Diop, Tamsir Mbaye, Harold Levrel & Antoine Comte
*Ecological Economics* 235, 2025
[[DOI]](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ecolecon.2025.108626)

<br>

**Subsidies against Nature: A Multidimensional Framework for Biodiversity-Aligned National Budgets**
with Adeline Vallet, Vincent Deschamps, Alexis Le Mieux, Antoine Oosterlinck, Hélène Soubelet, Lucie Dupuis & Harold Levrel
*Ecological Economics* 235, 2025
[[DOI]](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ecolecon.2025.108661)

<br>

**Economic Knowledge for Nature Preservation: An Epistemic Inquiry into Spatial Prioritization and International Action**
*Global Africa* 11, 2025
[[DOI]](https://doi.org/10.57832/4GCB-E751)

---

## Under Review

**New Nature–Economy Models are Needed to Understand the Macroeconomic and Financial Implications of the Ecological Transition**
with Romain Svartzman, Josh Althouse, Katie Kedward, Arthur Poupard, Baptiste Bedossa, Étienne Espagne & Andrea Modica Scala
Submitted to *Nature Perspectives*

<br>

**Systematic Classification of Biodiversity-Related Aid Using Natural Language Processing**
with Kerstin Wildgruber, Moritz Tötzke & Florian Egli
Submitted to *Nature Sustainability*

---

## Ongoing Work

**Market–Policy Coordination for Environmental Objectives across Institutional Contexts**
*Job market paper*

<br>

**Bioeconomy and Responsibility: An Ethical Framework for the Hybridisation of Knowledge**
with Felwine Sarr — *manuscript in preparation*

---

## Working Papers & Preprints

**Après l'encastrement. Savoirs économiques et transformations écologiques**
with Hugo Mosneron Dupin
*CIRED Working Papers*, 2026

<br>

**Chronicle of a Debt Foretold: Sovereign Debt Management Strategies for Colombia's Climate and Biodiversity Transition**
with Antoine Godin, Louis Daumas, Josh Althouse & Romain Svartzman
*CEPR Discussion Paper*, 2025

<br>

**Avenues for Exploring Nature Scenarios in Ecological Macroeconomic Models**
with Katie Kedward
*SSRN Preprint* 5200146, 2025
[[Preprint]](https://ssrn.com/abstract=5200146)

<br>

**From Climate to Nature Macro-Criticality: Exploring New Scenarios and Modelling Frameworks**
with Josh Althouse, Baptiste Bedossa, Étienne Espagne, Léa Faucher, Katie Kedward, Andrea Modica Scala & Arthur Poupard
*CEPR Discussion Paper*, 2025

<br>

**Bridging the Gap in Biodiversity Financing: A Review of Assessments of Existing and Needed Financial Flows for Biodiversity**
with Romain Svartzman & Josh Althouse
*UCL Institute for Innovation and Public Purpose*, 2024

<br>

**Financer la restauration écologique : un paysage en mutation. Le cas du Sénégal**
with Pape Diop, Mamadou Kande, Quentin Merour, Romain Prudhomme & Antoine Comte
*Cahiers de l'OHMi Téssékéré*, CNRS, no. 12 (2024): 29–41

---

## Policy Briefs & Blog Posts

**Biodiversity COP 16: Where EU Member States Stand on National Biodiversity Strategies and Action Plans**
with Josh Althouse, Léa Faucher & Romain Svartzman
*Institute for European Policymaking, Bocconi University*, 2024

<br>

**Limiter l'artificialisation des sols pour éviter une dette écologique se chiffrant en dizaines de milliards d'euros**
with Chloé Surun & Harold Levrel
*The Conversation*, August 25, 2021

<br>

**Zéro artificialisation nette : de la Convention citoyenne au texte de loi, une trajectoire en débat**
with Clara Claron, Luc Elie & Sarah Batellier
*Fonciers en débat*, June 15, 2021

<br>

**Stop à la neutralité carbone en trompe-l'œil : l'empreinte carbone au service d'une nouvelle stratégie industrielle**
*Institut Rousseau*, December 7, 2021

<br>

**Faire évoluer les outils comptables pour "réencastrer" l'activité économique dans son environnement**
with B. Métadier
*Institut Rousseau*, July 2, 2020

---

## Master Thesis

**Une dette écologique pour fonder les politiques de préservation du vivant**
Defining a national accounting framework in strong sustainability adapted to the fight against land artificialisation.
Université Paris Dauphine, 2021 — *Veblen Prize (Master's Thesis Award, 2022)*
[[Full text]](https://www.veblen-institute.org/IMG/pdf/19_-_m_-_une_dette_ecologique_pour_fonder_lespolitiques_de_preservation_du_vivant.pdf)
